titleStmt.title: SII 34.101: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 101. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman, 7th year, Makara, Tuesday, Ārdrā = c. 10th Century.

Partly hidden. This records a big endowment of land measuring 4 vēli and 13 mā by a Brāhmaṇa of Śrīkaṇṭa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam for feeding daily 3 śivayōgis and 2 Brāhmaṇas in the choultry (chattiram) on the hill at Tiruveṟumbiyūr. The sabhā of the village which met at the hall called Tiruchitrakūḍam decided to pay themselves the taxes on the endowed land in lieu of the tax capital received from the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kOvirājakEcari paṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu teṉkarai brahmadeyam śrīkaṇṭa caturvvedi maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyOm Ivvāṇṭu makara nāyaṟṟu cevvāykkiḻamaiyum pe
ṟṟa tiruvātirai nāṉṟu pakal Ivvūrt tiruccitrakūṭattēy dharmmi ceytu peruṅkuṟi kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu paṇippaṇiyāl paṇitta vyavasthai ceta paricāvatu Ivvūr vēṅkai Iḷaiya
urudrakumāra kramavittaṉ Ivvūrt tiruveṟumpiyūrāḷvār tirumalaimēl cattirattil Uṇṇavaitta kalam 5 Ivvaiñcu kalamum candrādittaval Uṇṇa Ivaṉ vaitta nilamāṟumā I
vvūr puṟavāykkuḷattuk kīḻ Ūriṉiṉṟum kiḻakku nōkkic ceṉṟu teṟkku nōkkik kuḷaṅkaraiyē Ēṟiṉa palāṟṟukkaraikku veṅkaiyarkaḷ dvādaśakkattum sabhaiyōm pakkal Ivarkaḷ vilaiko
ṇṭuṭaiya nilattilumāka vaṭakkaṭaiya Irumā nīkki Itaṉōṭumaṭaiya cekkāccey mūṉṟumāvum Ivvūrp piṭākaik karampaiyil muḷarikuṭṭai vāykkālukku vaṭakku Ivaṉ sabhaiyōm pakkal vilai
koṇṭuṭaiya Aivēliyil Ivaṉē Ivvūrt tiruvāyppāṭi śrīkṛṣṇa- rkkuk kuṭutta nilam pattuc ceyyum nīkki niṉṟa nilam 4(1/2) nāṉkaraiyum muṉ cuṭṭappaṭṭa mūṉṟumāvum Āka nilam
4(1/2) 3 mā li nāṉkaraiyE mūṉṟumāc ceyyum Ivaṉ cantrādittavaṟ civayOgikaḷ mūvarkkum brāhmaṇar Iruvarkkum Āka Ivaivarkkum Uṇṇa Ivaṉ vaitta Iṉ nilattukku
ṟukkavēṇṭum dravyam I vēṅkaiyiḷaiya Urudrakumāra kramavittaṉ pakkal sabhaiyōm koṇṭu Iṉṉilam nāṉkaraiyē mūṉṟu mācceyyum Iṟaiyiliyāka paṇittu Iṉṉila
yōm Iṟai kāṭṭap peṟātōmākavum Innilam Iṟai kaā ṭṭappaṇittāraiyum paṇitta sabhaiyiliruntāraiyum Iṟaikāṭṭiṉāraiyum vevvēṟṟu vakai tāṅkaḷ vēṇṭina poṉ Ivaṉ Anvayattār
maṉṟa peṟuvārākavum maṉṟi Iṟuttālum piṉṉaiyum Iṟai kāṭṭappeṟātōmākavum Ipparicu paṇittu vyavastai ceytu kaṉmēl
ṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Ipparicu pālāciriyaṉ Iḷaiya nārāyaṇa ṉārāyaṇaṉ paṇiyāl I vyavastai Eḻutiṉēṉ Ivvūr madhyastaṉ dharmapriyaṉāṉa kalivicayaṉ taruṇen=tucēkaraṉēṉ ..
Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
